stories.title: How a photographer captured Nolan Ryan's bloody jersey and created a 'Texas demigod'
stories.summary: Linda Kaye immortalized the pitcher in 1990, and their bond lasted for years.

stories.title: Busch had pneumonia for 'weeks' before death
stories.summary: Kyle Busch died last week from hemorrhagic shock and disseminated intravascular coagulation after complications from bacterial pneumonia led to sepsis, according to the former NASCAR star's death certificate.

stories.title: MLB proposes first salary cap since 1994 strike
stories.summary: Major League Baseball owners proposed a hard salary cap to players as part of the next CBA on Thursday, their first firm cap proposal since 1994.

stories.title: Sources: NBA's BOG passes anti-tanking changes
stories.summary: The NBA's board of governors voted overwhelmingly Thursday to change the league's draft lottery format, including expanding from 14 to 16 teams, as well as anti-tanking measures, the league announced.

stories.title: 4-time Cup champ Claude Lemieux dies at 60
stories.summary: Claude Lemieux, who won the Stanley Cup four times during a memorable NHL career, has died, the NHL Alumni Association announced Thursday. He was 60.
